case_title: MARKOS TAFESSE VS. ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO. OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO DEFT BRET SCHUMACHER RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BRET SCHUMACHER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-30-2011 AT 3:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAFESSE, MARKOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO. OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.00, THE CLAIM AGAINST BRETT SHUMAKER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
